>> Do you actively

>> Yeah, I think it it's definitely a

the thing that has to get managed the
most is closeness. And I think that
that's one that I don't hear talked

And uh, and basically the single premise
is that in modern society, people spend

just said, but it's creating space to be

day, it's like they become siblings.
They become like roommates. They don't
like have that mystery. They don't have

typically is creating enough distance
during the day um and even week to week

if you've ever I'm sure you have and
many people probably have like if you've

to see them. um it's like how do we

so um I think trying to actively push
the other person away, not in a not an
emotional way, but like physical space
um
is something that I would say that has
been helpful for us and not making that
a bad thing. So there's a difference
between um wanting to be alone and not

think being able to delineate that, like
being able to even have that
conversation up front, be like, "Hey,
I'm going to take three hours and just
like listen to this book or I'm going to

I think creating creating the permission
where this is not a thing. This isn't me

want to be with you. This is like I just

that I think just having that like

>> Real quick, if you're a business owner
